title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Halloween Party Northampton
description: Northampton goes spooky with Family Silent Disco's Halloween edition. Three channels keep everyone happy: Disney favourites for the little ones, chart hits for the teens, and throwback classics for parents. Add costumes, glowing headphones, and a buzzing dance floor, and you've got the ultimate two-hour family party. It's silly, joyful, and brilliantly inclusive — no arguments over music, no sulking in the corner. Just everyone, together, dancing like mad and laughing louder than ever. A Halloween memory you'll treasure more than any sweet stash.
